languages.text: "Сколь ловко вы подметили недосказанность, вложенную мной в предыдущий тезис!" {n}Эоганн пытается улыбнуться, но кривится в гримасе боли: манипуляторы трона, повинуясь воле древнего машинного духа, начинают возвращать на место все изъятые импланты.{/n} "Верно, та, которую вы создали со мной — вторая по счету. Первая попытка же стала той отправной точкой, что подстегнула мою жажду постижения тайн машины органического тела. Любопытнейшая история, Нунциус весьма увлекательно ее рассказывает!"

"Deftly deduced from my deliberate vagueness in my last thesis!" {n}Eogunn tries to smile, but winces in pain as the throne's manipulators, obeying the will of the ancient machine spirit, begin to return all the extracted implants to their previous positions.{/n} "You are correct — the one you and I created was the second attempt. The first was the starting point that whetted my thirst for the mysteries of the machine that is the organic body. A most fascinating story, Nuncius's telling of it most engaging!"
languages.original_text: "Сколь ловко вы подметили недосказанность, вложенную мной в предыдущий тезис!" {n}Эоганн пытается улыбнуться, но кривится в гримасе боли: манипуляторы трона, повинуясь воле древнего машинного духа, начинают возвращать на место все изъятые импланты.{/n} "Верно, та, которую вы создали со мной — вторая по счету. Первая попытка же той отправной точкой, что подстегнула мою жажду постижения тайн машины органического тела. Любопытнейшая история, Нунциус весьма увлекательно ее рассказывает!"

The first was the starting point that whetted my thirst for the mysteries of the machine that is the organic body. A most fascinating story, Nuncius's telling of it most engaging!"

The first was the starting point that whetted my thirst for the mysteries of the machine that is the organic body. A most fascinating story, Nuncius's telling of it most engaging!"

"Deftly deduced from my deliberate vagueness in my last thesis!" {n}Eogunn tries to smile, but winces in pain as the throne's manipulators, obeying the will of the ancient machine spirit, begin to return all the extracted implants to their previous positions.{/n} "You are correct — the one you and I created was the second attempt. The first was the starting point that whetted my thirst for the mysteries of the machine that is the organic body. A most fascinating story, Nuncius's telling of it most engaging!"

languages.text: "Geschickt aus der bewussten Unschärfe meiner letzten These abgeleitet!" {n}Eogunn versucht zu lächeln, zuckt aber vor Schmerz zusammen, als die Manipulatoren des Throns dem Willen des alten Maschinengeistes gehorchen und damit beginnen, alle extrahierten Implantate wieder an ihren gewohnten Positionen einzusetzen.{/n} "Ihr habt recht — der, den wir gemeinsam geschaffen haben, war der zweite Versuch. Der erste war der Ausgangspunkt, der meinen Durst nach den Mysterien der Maschine weckte, die der organische Körper ist. Eine ausgesprochen faszinierende Geschichte. Nuncius trägt sie mit großem Eifer vor!"
languages.original_text: "Deftly deduced from my deliberate vagueness in my last thesis!" {n}Eogunn tries to smile, but winces in pain as the throne's manipulators, obeying the will of the ancient machine spirit, begin to return all the extracted implants to their previous positions.{/n} "You are correct — the one you and I created was the second attempt. The first was the starting point that whetted my thirst for the mysteries of the machine that is the organic body. A most fascinating story, Nuncius's telling of it most engaging!"

traits.locale_text: "Geschickt aus der bewussten Unschärfe meiner letzten These abgeleitet!" {n}Eogunn versucht zu lächeln, zuckt aber vor Schmerz zusammen, als die Manipulatoren des Throns dem Willen des alten Maschinengeistes gehorchen und damit beginnen, alle extrahierten Implantate wieder an ihren gewohnten Positionen einzusetzen.{/n} "Ihr habt recht — der, den wir gemeinsam geschaffen haben, war der zweite Versuch. Der erste war der Ausgangspunkt, der meinen Durst nach den Mysterien der Maschine weckte, die der organische Körper ist. Eine ausgesprochen faszinierende Geschichte. Nuncius trägt sie mit großem Eifer vor!"

languages.text: « Brillante déduction suite au manque délibéré de précisions de ma précédente affirmation ! » {n}Eogunn tente de sourire, mais il grimace de douleur tandis que les manipulateurs du fauteuil, mus par la volonté du vieil esprit de la machine, commencent à remettre tous les implants extraits en place.{/n} « Vous avez raison, celui que nous avons créé ensemble était ma deuxième tentative. La première est ce qui a enflammé ma volonté d'en savoir plus sur les mystères de la machine qu'est le corps organique. C'est une histoire fascinante, et Nuncius la raconte extrêmement bien ! »
languages.original_text: "Deftly deduced from my deliberate vagueness in my last thesis!" {n}Eogunn tries to smile, but winces in pain as the throne's manipulators, obeying the will of the ancient machine spirit, begin to return all the extracted implants to their previous positions.{/n} "You are correct — the one you and I created was the second attempt. The first was the starting point that whetted my thirst for the mysteries of the machine that is the organic body. A most fascinating story, Nuncius's telling of it most engaging!"

traits.locale_text: « Brillante déduction suite au manque délibéré de précisions de ma précédente affirmation ! » {n}Eogunn tente de sourire, mais il grimace de douleur tandis que les manipulateurs du fauteuil, mus par la volonté du vieil esprit de la machine, commencent à remettre tous les implants extraits en place.{/n} « Vous avez raison, celui que nous avons créé ensemble était ma deuxième tentative. La première est ce qui a enflammé ma volonté d'en savoir plus sur les mystères de la machine qu'est le corps organique. C'est une histoire fascinante, et Nuncius la raconte extrêmement bien ! »

languages.text: “您从我上一篇论文里刻意模糊的表述中推导出了这一点——相当敏锐！”{n}伊奥贡试图挤出笑容，却因痛楚而微微抽搐。王座的机械触须在古老机魂的指引下，将所有摘除的植入物尽数复位。{/n}“您说得没错——我们共同创造的那一个，是第二次尝试。第一次仅仅是一个起点，却足以激起我对名为有机体的这台机器奥秘的无尽渴求。那段经历本身也颇为精彩，努恩修斯讲来尤其扣人心弦！”
languages.original_text: "Deftly deduced from my deliberate vagueness in my last thesis!" {n}Eogunn tries to smile, but winces in pain as the throne's manipulators, obeying the will of the ancient machine spirit, begin to return all the extracted implants to their previous positions.{/n} "You are correct — the one you and I created was the second attempt. The first was the starting point that whetted my thirst for the mysteries of the machine that is the organic body. A most fascinating story, Nuncius's telling of it most engaging!"

traits.locale_text: “您从我上一篇论文里刻意模糊的表述中推导出了这一点——相当敏锐！”{n}伊奥贡试图挤出笑容，却因痛楚而微微抽搐。王座的机械触须在古老机魂的指引下，将所有摘除的植入物尽数复位。{/n}“您说得没错——我们共同创造的那一个，是第二次尝试。第一次仅仅是一个起点，却足以激起我对名为有机体的这台机器奥秘的无尽渴求。那段经历本身也颇为精彩，努恩修斯讲来尤其扣人心弦！”

languages.text: «¡Una deducción astuta a partir de una declaración intencionadamente poco clara en mi última tesis!». {n}Eogunn intenta sonreír, pero se estremece de dolor cuando los manipuladores del trono, siguiendo la voluntad del antiguo espíritu máquina, empiezan a devolver los implantes extraídos a su posición.{/n} «Está en lo cierto. El que creé con su ayuda fue el segundo intento. El primero fue el punto de partida en mi interés por los misterios de la máquina a la que llamamos cuerpo humano. Es una historia fascinante, ¡especialmente narrada por Nuncius!».
languages.original_text: "Deftly deduced from my deliberate vagueness in my last thesis!" {n}Eogunn tries to smile, but winces in pain as the throne's manipulators, obeying the will of the ancient machine spirit, begin to return all the extracted implants to their previous positions.{/n} "You are correct — the one you and I created was the second attempt. The first was the starting point that whetted my thirst for the mysteries of the machine that is the organic body. A most fascinating story, Nuncius's telling of it most engaging!"

traits.locale_text: «¡Una deducción astuta a partir de una declaración intencionadamente poco clara en mi última tesis!». {n}Eogunn intenta sonreír, pero se estremece de dolor cuando los manipuladores del trono, siguiendo la voluntad del antiguo espíritu máquina, empiezan a devolver los implantes extraídos a su posición.{/n} «Está en lo cierto. El que creé con su ayuda fue el segundo intento. El primero fue el punto de partida en mi interés por los misterios de la máquina a la que llamamos cuerpo humano. Es una historia fascinante, ¡especialmente narrada por Nuncius!».

languages.text: 「前の命題でわざと曖昧にしておいたところを、見事に推し量ったな！」{n}エオガンは笑みを浮かべようとするが、苦痛に顔をゆがめる。古代の機械霊の意思に従い、玉座のマニピュレーターが、取り出されたインプラントをすべて元の位置へと戻し始める。{/n}「その通り――君と私が創り上げたのは二度目の試みだった。最初のものは、有機の肉体という機械の神秘への渇望をかき立てた出発点だったのだ。実に魅力的な物語でね、ヌンキウスの語り口がまた格別なのだ！」
languages.original_text: "Deftly deduced from my deliberate vagueness in my last thesis!" {n}Eogunn tries to smile, but winces in pain as the throne's manipulators, obeying the will of the ancient machine spirit, begin to return all the extracted implants to their previous positions.{/n} "You are correct — the one you and I created was the second attempt. The first was the starting point that whetted my thirst for the mysteries of the machine that is the organic body. A most fascinating story, Nuncius's telling of it most engaging!"

traits.locale_text: 「前の命題でわざと曖昧にしておいたところを、見事に推し量ったな！」{n}エオガンは笑みを浮かべようとするが、苦痛に顔をゆがめる。古代の機械霊の意思に従い、玉座のマニピュレーターが、取り出されたインプラントをすべて元の位置へと戻し始める。{/n}「その通り――君と私が創り上げたのは二度目の試みだった。最初のものは、有機の肉体という機械の神秘への渇望をかき立てた出発点だったのだ。実に魅力的な物語でね、ヌンキウスの語り口がまた格別なのだ！」

languages.text: "Son tezimdeki kasıtlı belirsizliğimden ustaca bir çıkarım yaptınız!" {n}Gülümsemeye çalışan Eogunn, tahtın manipülatörleri kadim makine ruhunun iradesine uyarak çıkarılan tüm implantları eski konumlarına döndürmeye başladığında acıyla yüzünü buruşturuyor.{/n} "Evet. Birlikte yarattığımız ikinci girişimdi. İlki, organik beden denilen makinenin gizemlerine olan susuzluğumu kabartan başlangıç noktasıydı. Nuncius'un çok ilgi çekici bulduğu, çok büyüleyici bir hikâyedir!"
languages.original_text: "Deftly deduced from my deliberate vagueness in my last thesis!" {n}Eogunn tries to smile, but winces in pain as the throne's manipulators, obeying the will of the ancient machine spirit, begin to return all the extracted implants to their previous positions.{/n} "You are correct — the one you and I created was the second attempt. The first was the starting point that whetted my thirst for the mysteries of the machine that is the organic body. A most fascinating story, Nuncius's telling of it most engaging!"
